title: Sky Ocean Serenit
body:
The image shows a beautiful, tranquil beach scene. In the foreground, soft golden sand stretches along the shore, gently meeting the clear, turquoise water. Small waves roll in rhythmically, creating white foam as they break near the beach.

Further out, the ocean deepens into a rich blue, blending seamlessly with the horizon. Above, the sky is bright and expansive, filled with soft white clouds. Sunlight streams through the clouds, casting a gentle glow over the water and enhancing the vibrant shades of blue.

Overall, the scene feels peaceful and refreshing, capturing the calm and natural beauty of a sunny day by the sea.

The sky only shines with Optifine
